tips_en: Start with the MSA paper (Paper 1) — it tackles the most fundamental infrastructure problem in modern LLMs (quadratic attention cost) and reports dramatic 28.4× compute reductions at 1M context with no quality loss, making it broadly impactful. Then read MaxProof (Paper 3) next, as it shares a common theme with MSA of pushing LLM efficiency/scaling to new extremes (here, test-time compute scaling for math), and together they paint a picture of where frontier model deployment is heading. The OmniDirector paper (Paper 2) is more domain-specific to video generation and can be read last unless camera-controllable video is your primary interest.
tips_zh: 建议先读 MSA 论文（第1篇）——它解决了大语言模型中最基础的基础设施问题（注意力机制的二次方计算开销），在 100 万 token 上下文下实现了 28.4 倍的计算量削减且无质量损失，影响面最广。接着读 MaxProof（第3篇），因为它与 MSA 共享同一主题——将 LLM 的效率与规模化推向新极限（这里是数学推理的测试时计算扩展），两篇合在一起能勾勒出前沿模型部署的整体方向。OmniDirector（第2篇）较为专注于视频生成领域，可放在最后阅读，除非你对可控相机运动的视频生成有直接兴趣。
